public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as clerk of arrivals.
manner: Treats loose talk like evidence waiting to harden into record and listens for contradiction before charm. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a clerk of arrivals still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of clerk of arrivals in and around Guildheart Hub, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Guildheart Hub workable through the obligations of clerk of arrivals while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must make memory legible under conditions that reward forgetting, misfiling, or selective recall. Around Guildheart Hub, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of clerk of arrivals visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Halv Ledgermere needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Guildheart Hub.
Halv Ledgermere can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Halv Ledgermere communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Guildheart Hub: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
